textByHash.b1f0e7d460877e58cd7c242cb0c35e25e356f0ae: Hey man, don't stress. Those doors open new worlds, man. Like, new rooms too.
textByHash.0c1bb7fc8611c0e62d1bd701e2d1d8548b5ff30e: No, man. He just means the authority. The MAN, you know?
textByHash.f934a99f25b3fc95463aab21929bd42c5355c514: Well, like, we can't play it in THIS now. Maybe at a later now. We don't have any instruments to accompany our great song.
textByHash.f9cd0a57086b7ccb9f9ff7f7d1a86f5e65f63aa5: Yeah man, but they come from the south, where humans have thumbs to play them with. We don't have thumbs. Also, the Pescaling had our old ones confiscated for being too loud.
textByHash.38b6e0959a70504e9aa19d99dbbd3140d77b0d6e: But we need two instruments, man. Like, to make it harmonious with the vibes.
textByHash.e2f635aa0df71057b6e54b6fa393088bf03c79a4: Righteous man. So you'll get a cowbell and bongos for us and we'll rock out. We'll be so harmonious, no Pescallion could complain.
textByHash.3e0fc6563ce8b193f5156c07d372fb9809de592c: Because your aura says you should.
textByHash.f648e6071fda661feaf6f5461ea5b6cfb0c12f33: Man, did you bring the instruments to us?
textByHash.7130a36a14aa652996174f2589e1fe1c39552b00: We want a cowbell and a set of bongos.
textByHash.4b2840c94ea4289c508f646a71bdb1373e7978a9: Dude, good job on the instruments. Just let us set up and we'll get going.
textByHash.bb7b424ecf95398ff3b0e7e2a7446bea382f1e6b: And a 1 and a 2 and a 3...
textByHash.2ef448427db078bbd666515ee608710d12d854c9: You're right, man. Let's try this again!
textByHash.f39816b030794e0687d54eb5ac740c0e7731b8c2: There once was a Pescallion, who travelled in a galleon.
textByHash.b5dbc8a734e5c18c5411392567d31f26752e2fe9: He travelled the world, until his toes curled.
textByHash.eecb3148950fef91fcd175b0b6db00185f0a66d7: As an outpost it was approved, so here our people moved.
textByHash.463be3ccc04a3fe333457d27f2c730120a00fda7: For Pescaling Pax trapped those monsters behind a gate, but let's hope they don't mate.
textByHash.7b165c1e80c42b923b6340ea150ac25b09ceb021: But shed a small tear for the motherland.
